name: smartsuite-mcp-server
description: Local MCP server for governed access to SmartSuite solutions, applications, records, fields, comments, and SmartDocs.

base_url.title: SmartSuite API Base URL
base_url.description: SmartSuite API base URL. Leave as default unless using a private instance.

mode.title: Access Mode
mode.description: readonly: inspect data only. readwrite: create and update records. admin: all operations.

max_records.title: Maximum Records Per Tool Call
max_records.description: Hard cap for list and query tools.

enable_delete.title: Enable Delete Tools
enable_delete.description: Allow record deletion. Destructive — requires confirmation.

enable_smartdoc_write.title: Enable SmartDoc Writes
enable_smartdoc_write.description: Allow appending content to SmartDoc fields.
